question.question_text: What will the USD/CAD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day forecast, a random walk model suggests the current rate is the best point estimate. Confidence intervals are derived assuming a daily standard deviation of approximately 0.2% of the current rate, reflecting typical short-term market volatility.
